name: Allison Transmission Holdings Inc
summary: Overview Allison Transmission Holdings, Inc. and its subsidiaries (Allison, we, us or our) is a global leader in high-performance mobility and work solutions built for the needs of the modern industrial world. The business was founded in 1915 and has been headquartered in Indianapolis, Indiana since inception. Allison is traded on the New York Stock Exchange under the symbol ALSN.
